import ComputedBoxPlot from "@/components/chart/computed-box-plot.astro";
import LabelDistributionChart from "@/components/chart/label-distribution-chart.astro";
import SimplicialShapeTable from "@/components/simplicial-shape-table.astro";
import Stat from "@/components/stat.astro";
import TabBar from "@/components/tab-bar.astro";
import { formatNumber } from "@/utils/format";

## Overview

The PubMed co-citation network is a hypergraph where nodes are scientific papers from the PubMed database and hyperedges are sets of papers that are co-cited together by another paper.
Each node is labeled with the paper's research topic, chosen from three diabetes-related categories: Diabetes Mellitus Experimental, Diabetes Mellitus Type 1, and Diabetes Mellitus Type 2.
This dataset is commonly used as a benchmark in hypergraph learning tasks, particularly for biomedical document classification.

## Statistics

<TabBar label="Interpretation" tabs={["Simplicial Complex", "Hypergraph"]}>
  <div class="space-y-5" role="tabpanel" data-tab-panel="0">
    <p>
      In the simplicial-complex interpretation, each co-citation set generates a
      simplex together with all of its subsets. The shape below is the full
      f-vector of that closure, with isolated papers retained as 0-simplices.
    </p>
    <dl class="not-prose grid gap-5 sm:grid-cols-3">
      <Stat
        title="Nodes"
        value={formatNumber(frontmatter["statistics"]["num-nodes"])}
      />
      <Stat title="Node Type" value="Scientific Paper" />
      <Stat title="Node Label" value="Research Topic" />
      <Stat
        title="Active Vertices"
        value={formatNumber(frontmatter["simplicial-complex"]["active-vertices"])}
        description="Papers appearing in at least one co-citation set."
      />
      <Stat
        title="Maximal Simplices"
        value={formatNumber(frontmatter["simplicial-complex"]["maximal-simplices"])}
      />
      <Stat
        title="Max Dimension"
        value={frontmatter["simplicial-complex"]["shape"].length - 1}
      />
      <LabelDistributionChart
        title="Node Label Distribution"
        labels={frontmatter["label-count"]}
        class="sm:col-span-3"
      />
    </dl>
    <SimplicialShapeTable shape={frontmatter["simplicial-complex"]["shape"]} />
  </div>

  <div class="space-y-5" role="tabpanel" data-tab-panel="1" hidden>
    <div>
      <h3 class="mb-4 text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-black-100 dark:text-white">
        Nodes
      </h3>
      <dl class="not-prose grid gap-5 sm:grid-cols-3">
        <Stat
          title="Nodes"
          value={formatNumber(frontmatter["statistics"]["num-nodes"])}
        />
        <Stat title="Node Type" value="Scientific Paper" />
        <Stat title="Node Label" value="Research Topic" />
        <ComputedBoxPlot
          title="Node Degree"
          values={frontmatter["statistics"]["node-degrees"]}
          class="sm:col-span-3"
        />
        <LabelDistributionChart
          title="Node Label Distribution"
          labels={frontmatter["label-count"]}
          class="sm:col-span-3"
        />
      </dl>
    </div>

    <div>
      <h3 class="mb-4 text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-black-100 dark:text-white">
        Hyperedges
      </h3>
      <dl class="not-prose grid gap-5 sm:grid-cols-2">
        <Stat
          title="Hyperedges"
          value={formatNumber(frontmatter["statistics"]["num-interactions"])}
        />
        <Stat title="Hyperedge Type" value="Co-Citation Set" />
        <ComputedBoxPlot
          title="Hyperedge Degree"
          values={frontmatter["statistics"]["edge-degrees"]}
          class="sm:col-span-2"
        />
      </dl>
    </div>
  </div>
</TabBar>
